Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Document Replit Secrets and production URL

Updates CLAUDE.md with critical information about the project''s deployment and secrets management:

**Replit Secrets Documentation:**
- Clarified that ALL API keys are stored in Replit Secrets (not in .env files)
- Explained how Replit''s secure vault system works
- Added instructions for accessing secrets via lock icon in sidebar
- Documented the relationship between Replit Secrets and .secrets.local mirror

**Production Information:**
- Added live production URL: https://AILitStudents.replit.app
- Documented Replit deployment environment
- Noted automatic HTTPS and public accessibility

**Why This Matters:**
- Prevents confusion about where API keys are stored
- Ensures future Claude sessions understand the Replit environment
- Provides clear guidance for testing the live application
- Improves onboarding for anyone working with this codebase

This documentation is critical for maintaining security and avoiding accidental key exposure in git history.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
